no: PnP Tweak Pack: fiend summoning, celestials, and creature-focused rule changes. Install before SCS

conflicts.reason: IR detects aTweaks and adjusts. Install order dependent. Item Revisions and aTweaks overlap

aTweaks auto-blocks components 102, 103, 204, 205, 211 when SR detected (content duplication prevention). Components 104, 105, 150-156 have built-in SR compatibility code and install fine. Install SR before aTweaks.
conflicts.myComps: #102 Spiritual Hammer, #103 Dispel vs Globes, #204 Mislead, #205 Project Image, #211 Death Ward (auto-blocked by aTweaks installer when SR present)
conflicts.source: aTweaks tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE !MOD_IS_INSTALLED spell_rev.tp2 0; c150.tpa/c190.tpa SR compat code; Bart_Tweaks crossmod patches, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Replace Baseline XP Table for Picking Locks, Disarming Traps and Learning Spells
Choose one "disable quickslot items for Simulacra and Projected Images" tweak
Choose one tweak for container storage capacity

Real overlap for undead only. aTweaks cn:160 and MiH cn:0 both modify undead creature stats. Neither detects the other. Install MiH before aTweaks (PnP values override). MiH has NO mephit/elemental revisions — aTweaks cn:180/190 are unique.
conflicts.myComps: #160 PnP Undead #180 PnP Mephits #190 PnP Elementals

conflicts.reason: No real overlap for selected components. aTweaks cn:140 (Gnome traits) modifies creature/item/script files for gnome racial encounters — does NOT modify any 2DA tables. ToF cn:20000 (Subraces) modifies savecng.2da for gnome saving throws. Different files. aTweaks cn:130 (Dwarf traits) and cn:213 (Expanded save tables) are ToF cn:40450 (Evasion) and cn:80150 (THAC0) don't touch racial trait files.
conflicts.myComps: #140 Gnome racial traits (IN preset, no 2DA overlap) #130 Dwarf traits (NOT) #213 Save tables (NOT)
conflicts.source: aTweaks cn:140 modifies CRE/ITM/BCS files; ToF cn:20000 modifies savecng.2da; no shared files, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: aTweaks druid shapeshift and clone tweaks are generic spell fixes. AK Shapeshifter Overhaul creates a new kit with own abilities. Complementary.

Complementary — different layers. aTweaks cn:202 modifies SPIN101-106 spell EFFECTS (rewrites mechanics + casting time). Transitions cn:10 creates NEW powers (#LPWR01/#LPWR02) and grants them during BG1 dream. Transitions cn:140 GRANTS existing SPIN101-106 via AddSpecialAbility() scripts — does not modify the spell files. No shared files. aTweaks changes what the powers do; Transitions controls when you get them. Install aTweaks before Transitions.
conflicts.myComps: #202 #241 Revised Bhaalpowers #218 Regain Bhaalpowers in ToB
conflicts.theirComps: #10 BGI dream with new Bhaalspawn power #140 Irenicus movie restores Bhaalspawn powers
conflicts.source: aTweaks c202.tpa modifies SPIN101-106.SPL effects; Transitions grants via AddSpecialAbility() in scripts, never touches .spl files, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: cn:155 (Revised Fiend Summoning) and cn:156 (Fiendish Gating) require one of the PnP Fiends base components (cn:150, 152, or 153) to be installed first. Without the base component, these will silently skip.
conflicts.myComps: #155 Further Revised Fiend Summoning #156 Fiendish gating

conflicts.reason: fullplate cn:1 corrupts AC#WCOHD.ITM from 794 to 746 bytes via COPY_EXISTING_REGEXP on all ITM files. Breaks aTweaks PnP creature components.

spells: Spiritual Hammer changed to ranged force weapon
Dispel/Remove Magic can now take down Globes of Invulnerability
Breach can now take down Stoneskin applied by items
Warrior innate abilities now cast instantly
Nishruu/Hakeashar vulnerable to Dispel Magic again

sum: PnP-accurate tweaks to creatures, spells, and game mechanics. Brings fiends, undead, and magical effects closer to tabletop AD&D rules.

co.n: Restore innate infravision to Half-Orc characters
co.no: Restores Half-Orc infravision that was removed in Enhanced Editions.
co.tp2n: Restore innate infravision to Half-Orc characters

co.n: Prevent skeletal and incorporeal undead from being affected by Illithids' Devour Brain attack
co.no: Skeletal and incorporeal undead are immune to Illusion spells (Blindness, etc.).
co.tp2n: Prevent skeletal and incorporeal undead from being affected by Illithids' Devour Brain attack

co.n: Change Spiritual Hammer into a ranged force weapon
co.no: Auto-blocked by aTweaks when Spell Revisions is installed (REQUIRE_PREDICATE !MOD_IS_INSTALLED spell_rev.tp2 0). Do not select with SR.
co.tp2n: Change Spiritual Hammer into a ranged force weapon

co.n: Allow Dispel/Remove Magic to take down Globes of Invulnerability
co.no: Thrown Hammers mod requires installation after this component
co.tp2n: Allow Dispel/Remove Magic to take down Globes of Invulnerability

co.no: Color Spray uses PnP rules: affects creatures based on hit dice, not level.
Dimension Door uses PnP rules: teleport to visible location.

co.n: Magical arrows and bolts deal bonus damage equal to their enchantment level
co.no: Magical arrows/bolts deal bonus damage matching their enchantment level (+1, +2, etc.).
co.tp2n: Magical arrows and bolts deal bonus damage equal to their enchantment level

co.no: See CamDawg guide on SHS for adding mod spells to scribing
co.scn: Allow Mages to scribe memorized spells onto scrolls

co.n: Scroll Scribing: Only at inns and strongholds
co.scn: Allow Mages to scribe memorized spells onto scrolls
co.no: Scroll scribing variant: can only scribe scrolls at inns and strongholds, not anywhere.
co.tp2n: Scrolls can only be scribed at inns and strongholds

co.n: Restore innate disease immunity to Paladins
co.no: Restores innate disease immunity to Paladin class (removed in some EE patches).
co.tp2n: Restore innate disease immunity to Paladins

co.n: Rangers' Animal Empathy improves with experience
co.no: Ranger Animal Empathy skill improves with level, affecting more powerful creatures.
co.tp2n: Rangers' Animal Empathy improves with experience

co.no: Adds PnP racial traits to Dwarves (saving throw bonuses, combat bonuses vs giants).
Adds PnP racial traits to Gnomes (saving throw bonuses, illusion resistance).
PnP Fiends variant: only affects vanilla fiends, not mod-added ones.
PnP Fiends variant: also affects mod-added fiend creatures.

co.n: Give aTweaks scripts to all fiends but do not alter statistics
co.no: PnP Fiends variant: gives aTweaks AI scripts to all fiends but keeps original stats.
co.tp2n: Give aTweaks scripts to all fiends but do not alter statistics

co.no: Requires PnP Fiends base (cn:150, 152, or 153) to be installed first.
Requires PnP Fiends base (cn:150, 152, or 153) to be installed first.
Revises undead creatures to PnP stats (immunities, resistances, special abilities).
MiH EQ has NO mephit revisions — zero overlap. aTweaks cn:180 is the only mod touching mephits.
Revises fey creatures (nymphs, dryads, sprites) to PnP stats and abilities.
Not balanced for BG1 content content
Revises spider, wyvern, and ettercap creatures to PnP stats. Requires BG2/ToB/BG2EE.
Revises ooze creatures to PnP stats. Requires BG2/ToB/BG2EE.
Revises plant creatures to PnP stats. Requires BG2/ToB/BG2EE.
Revises elemental creatures to PnP stats. Requires BG2/ToB/BG2EE.

co.n: Increase the Hit Dice of Elemental Princes
co.no: other mods do similar things (MiH Fixes, ToF/SCS...)
co.tp2n: Increase the Hit Dice of Elemental Princes

co.n: Allow Breach to take down Stoneskin effects applied by items
co.no: Allows Breach to remove Stoneskin effects from items (not just spells)
co.tp2n: Allow Breach to take down Stoneskin effects applied by items

co.no: Warrior innate abilities (Berserker Rage, Kai, etc.) cast instantly instead of having casting time.

co.n: Bhaalpowers: Enhance and standardize casting time
co.no: Don't mix with Slayer Revisions
co.tp2n: Enhance the Bhaalpowers and standardize their casting time

co.no: Bhaalpowers variant: only standardizes casting time without enhancing effects.
co.tp2n: Only standardize the Bhaalpowers' casting time

co.no: Regain Bhaalspawn powers in ToB. Not needed with Themed Tweaks/Transitions Bhaalspawn powers dream
Makes druidic shapeshifting uninterruptable. May be incompatible with non-vanilla shapeshift mods (AK, ToF, SCS)

co.n: Prevent Mislead clones from singing Bard songs
co.tp2n: Prevent Mislead clones from singing Bard songs

co.n: Prevent Project Image and Simulacrum clones from using quickslot items
co.tp2n: Prevent Project Image and Simulacrum clones from using quickslot items

co.n: Make Death Ward protect against Vorpal Hits
co.no: Death Ward also protects against vorpal hit instant-kill effects.
co.tp2n: Make Death Ward protect against Vorpal Hits

co.n: Restore the Dispel Magic vulnerability to Nishruu and Hakeashars
co.no: Not needed when using EE Fixpack
co.tp2n: Restore the Dispel Magic vulnerability to Nishruu and Hakeashars

co.n: Make alignment detection spells more accurate
co.no: Alignment detection spells (Know Alignment, Detect Evil) give more accurate results.
co.tp2n: Make alignment detection spells more accurate

co.n: Expanded saving throw bonus tables for Dwarves, Gnomes and Halflings
co.no: Old code, may cause issues. Known to conflict with jtweaks
co.tp2n: Expanded saving throw bonus tables for Dwarves, Gnomes and Halflings

co.n: Bard Song Invis: Only Jester breaks invisibility
co.no: v Bard songs break invisibility
co.tp2n: Only the Jester song breaks invisibility

co.n: Bard Song Invis: All songs break invisibility
co.no: Bard Song invisibility variant: all bard songs break invisibility when sung.

co.n: XP Rewards: Lowered from locks, traps, scrolls
co.no: May fail if DEMPIT.cre was modified by another creature mod to incompatible format
co.scn: Altered XP rewards from locks, traps and scrolls
co.tp2n: Improved (lowered) XP rewards from locks, traps and scrolls

co.n: XP Rewards: None from locks, traps, scrolls
co.scn: Altered XP rewards from locks, traps and scrolls
co.no: XP reward variant: no XP from picking locks, disarming traps, or scribing scrolls.
co.tp2n: No XP rewards from locks, traps and scrolls

co.no: Quest rewards are unbiased by alignment and reputation.
Adds a simple automated thief script for find traps, detect illusions, and backstab.
Adds a simple automated bard script for bard song and spellcasting.
Adds a simple automated cleric/paladin script for healing and buffing.

co.n: IWD casting graphics: Fast animation speed (matches IWD)
co.no: Replaces BG2 casting animations with IWD-style. Fast speed matching IWD.
co.scn: Use Icewind Dale's Dimension Door animation

co.n: IWD casting graphics: Slow animation speed (matches BG2)
co.no: IWD casting graphics at BG2-style slow speed.
co.scn: Use Icewind Dale's Dimension Door animation

co.n: IWD casting graphics: IWD for spells, BG2 for other visuals
co.no: Hybrid: IWD animations for spell casting, BG2 animations for other effects.
co.scn: Use Icewind Dale's Dimension Door animation
co.tp2n: Use IWD animation for spells, retain BG2 animation for other visuals

co.n: IWD casting graphics: Fast with shorter delays
co.no: Fast IWD animations with shorter delay between animation start and creature appearance.
co.scn: Use Icewind Dale's Dimension Door animation
co.tp2n: Fast animation speed, shorter delay between animation start and creature appearance/disappearance

co.n: Change the appearance of Valygar's armor
co.no: Changes Valygar's armor appearance to a different visual model.
co.tp2n: Change the appearance of Valygar's armor

co.n: Change the appearance of the Robe of Vecna
co.no: Changes the Robe of Vecna appearance to a different visual model.
co.tp2n: Change the appearance of the Robe of Vecna

co.n: Give Shambling Mounds their proper soundset
co.no: DEPRECATED. NON-EE ONLY — REQUIRE_PREDICATE ENGINE_IS ~tob~. Will not install on EET.
co.tp2n: Give Shambling Mounds their proper soundset

co.n: Give Mariliths their Icewind Dale soundset
co.no: DEPRECATED. NON-EE ONLY — REQUIRE_PREDICATE ENGINE_IS ~tob~. Will not install on EET.
co.tp2n: Give Mariliths their Icewind Dale soundset

co.no: Gives distinctive coloring to creature types (e.g., green for trolls, blue for ogre magi).
Gives distinctive soundsets to creature types.
v Slightly expanded storage capacity for containers
co.scn: Slightly expanded storage capacity for containers
co.tp2n: Use the recommended storage capacity value (999)

co.scn: Slightly expanded storage capacity for containers
co.no: Manual storage capacity — ACTION_READLN prompts for custom value. Cannot be automated

in.t: This component prompts for manual storage capacity input (ACTION_READLN) — cannot be automated.

co.tp2n: Manually enter the storage capacity value

co.no: Heavy containers may cause slowdowns when carrying many items
Updates aTweaks-added content to use BG2-style inventory icons.

advisories.reason: aTweaks scroll scribing changes may interact with cdtweaks storekeeper identification limits
aTweaks expanded save tables and jtweaks save-related fixes may interact
